name: Antichess
author: AGP
description: Antichess (a.k.a. Losing Chess / Giveaway), the lichess variant. The goal is inverted: you win by losing all your pieces, or by having no legal move. The king is not royal (no check, no checkmate, it can be captured and a pawn may promote to a king) and capturing is compulsory — if any capture is available you must make one. No castling. White (player 0) moves first.
